cycle: Change the green leaves in the pile to a vibrant magenta color.
Restore the vibrant magenta leaves to their original green color.
Apply a glossy, wet texture to all the dried leaves on the ground.
Remove the glossy, wet texture and restore the leaves to their original dry, matte finish.
Change the grey stone pavement to a smooth, white marble surface.
Revert the white marble surface back to the original rough grey stone pavement.
Change the yellow leaves to a deep, rich purple.
Restore the deep purple leaves to their original yellow color.
Transform the brown, withered leaves into fresh, bright green leaves.
Restore the fresh bright green leaves to their original brown, withered state.
long_chain: Remove the fallen leaves and stone pavement, replacing the ground with a wet asphalt road reflecting distant city lights.
Add towering skyscrapers with bright neon signs in the background, creating a dense cyberpunk cityscape behind the road.
Change the time of day to midnight with heavy rain falling on the cyberpunk street, creating ripples in the puddles.
Transform the wet asphalt road into a flowing river of liquid mercury cutting through the futuristic city.
Replace the skyscrapers with giant, organic mushroom structures glowing with bioluminescent blue spots.
Change the overall color palette of the mushroom forest scene to deep indigo and electric violet tones.
Add large, translucent jellyfish-like creatures drifting through the humid air above the glowing mushrooms.
Transform the ground beneath the mushrooms into a grid of transparent hexagonal glass tiles revealing a starry void underneath.
Replace the sky above the scene with a view of outer space featuring a giant ringed planet and nebulae.
Apply a soft watercolor painting style to the entire space-mushroom scene, blending the edges and enhancing the pastel colors.
